name: Whittle Hubby Daycare - Matriarchal Mommy Society Series - Giantess - ABDL - Femdom - Matriarchy - Loving - Age Play (Still 18+)
description: You get sent to The Whittle Hubby Daycare! Where all the wives and ladies drop off their males so they can shop in peace! All males are adults only. This takes place in the 3000s in a gentle dystopic future where maternal women are in control.
creator: TheGreatVinland
